creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
My e-mails to stefan don't seem to be getting to him for some reason, so I'm sending this to the bug-followup e-mail address, hopefully it'll work instead...

I was able to get the latest version to compile, but I first had to upgrade SWT to 3.2.x, I had 3.1.x installed, which I suppose may have caused the compile problems with 2.5.0.4.  In any case, I no longer have the compile problem anymore.

Naram Qashat
